reviews.review_description:
A Promising and Immersive VR Shooter
After spending some time with the game, it’s clear it’s heading in the right direction. The gunplay feels powerful and satisfying, with stylish futuristic weapons and engaging reload mechanics that work especially well in VR. The visuals are atmospheric and detailed, with strong worldbuilding and smart, aggressive enemies that keep the action tense and dynamic. While it’s still in early access and has a few rough edges, nothing breaks the experience. The developers’ progress is noticeable, and the game already stands as a solid, immersive VR shooter well worth your time.

reviews.review_title: Looked nice in the trailer but...
reviews.review_description:
...in the headset it's a real mess.

Clunky controls, simplistic enemy AI, and generic graphics.  It feels like a Sidequest indie project from years ago that you'd either get for free or for a couple of bucks from itch io.

The worst thing is that it just isn't any fun to play.

"Direct the brush of your hand towards the gun" 

What does that even mean? 

Also, a movement and gun tutorial? In 2024??? These things should be intuitive! I got bored real quick.

Even for a work in progress, it's pretty clear that LOTS more work is needed. Start with basic English, that'd help.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your recommendation we will take your advice as well. And our team will work on it to make it better!

reviews.review_description: Not for me in this state!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback, could you please flesh it out? To make our game better based on your feedback.

reviews.review_title: A dystopian future, I'm excited for!
reviews.review_description: From playing the demo, I can surely say I'm excited for this dystopian future (not a phrase I can say I've said very often). Fun gameplay, with an interesting story & plenty to build on from the demo. More weapons, more enemies, more environments, I can't want to take on more futuristic vampires!

reviews.review_title: Stiff, Odd Controls and Budget Feel
reviews.review_description: The grip buttons is used to pick up and drop guns which is really odd and leads to frequent accidents where you drop the gun when you want to "grip" it. You also just point the guns down and wait to reload; there is no manual reload mechanic. The "sci-fi" weapons feel disappointingly flat and have no punch to them. IMO, there are many better alternatives. I'll give the in-game splash screens 10/10 though. 😅

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We've been thinking a lot about letting the player choose their own way of control, and your feedback was the starting point. In the next (final) version of the demo you will be able to immerse yourself in the world of our game with comfortable controls. Thank you for helping us to make the game better!

reviews.review_description: Yeah it was interesting but it changed my height through the floor sometimes then through the roof and there isn’t a way to reload unless putting down the gun and picking it back up but it was alright and I can’t wait to see what this game will be

developer_response.body: Good afternoon, thank you for the feedback, we are sorry to hear that you had difficulties with our game. Regarding reloading, it is there, through putting the arm with the weapon down (such a rather arcade version), perhaps we should add a little more hints on how to reload. The fact that your height was changing is a bug that we are working on and it will be fixed in the next patch. We are working on improving the game and every feedback is important to us. You will enjoy the full version of the game.

reviews.review_title: Story driven FPS action at its finest
reviews.review_description: Everything from the main menu to helmet UI to hot swapping weapons and pickup items is done right. Story beside gameplay is perfect and combat is very immersing and will get your adrenaline pumping.
A zombie apocalypse-themed shooter featuring both single-player and multiplayer modes. It offers a satisfying gunplay experience and immersive environments the graphics are awesome.

reviews.review_title: Waiting for the full version of the
reviews.review_description: This game is dope. Amazing idea and graphics for a VR project.. Keep up the good work

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback, we'll keep up the good work!

reviews.review_description:
This game is just the bomb, it's impossible to tear yourself away! The battles are exciting, the plot makes you taste all the secrets of the planet Karn, and the atmosphere ... it's amazing! Graphics are like a visualization of my dream, music and sounds surround you, making you forget about everything in the world.

And the emotions in Dixotomia are something! They are just off the scale! Feelings from the game can't be conveyed in words, you just need to experience them on your own skin. And the plot... Oh-oh-oh-oh! Here every turn makes your heart beat faster, and every decision keeps you on your nerves. You definitely won't get bored here! So, if you want unrealistically cool adrenaline and a sea of emotions, Dixotomia is your choice, without variants!
I liked the game. very active, you need to run and fight with robots.
What do they mean by brush your hand toward the gun everyone delete this game it’s worth the storage

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback

We understand your question and dissatisfaction. Our team is working on this issue. When a new patch is released the text will be correct.

reviews.review_description: Very nice visual and interesting sci-fi style. Enjoyable shooting and movement in general) I'm looking forward to the development of this game!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback, we'll keep up the good work!
